meta.title: Room Directory
meta.description: Each room is a doorway to a different world. Step inside, share your story, and join others in building something beautiful.

roomsDirectory.heading: Room Directory
roomsDirectory.intro: Start with the rooms that feel alive right now, or wander by topic until something clicks. Every room is a different writing prompt, fandom, or shared obsession waiting for your voice.
roomsDirectory.empty: No rooms are available at the moment. Check back later!
roomsDirectory.recentlyActiveSubtitle: The quickest way to find a room with people in it right now.
roomsDirectory.topicSubtitle: Open a topic to explore its rooms.
